name: signingGetJWT
title: Get Self-Signed JWT
description: Create a self-signed EdDSA JWT (did:key identity) using a stored signing key. Authenticated.

publicKey.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 public key identifying the signing key

passphrase.description: Passphrase to decrypt the signing key

audience.description: Optional audience claim (aud) for the JWT

lifetime.description: Token lifetime in seconds. Default: 3600 (1 hour)
